title: diabetic-retinopathy-classification
description: Machine learning-based classification of diabetic retinopathy using retinal images. Includes preprocessing, feature engineering (statistical, texture, frequency), PCA, and models like KNN, SVM, and Random Forest. Implemented in MATLAB without built-in ML functions.

title: APT_Manuscript_Script
description: A Machine Learning/Deep Learning framework for detecting Advanced Persistent Threats (APTs) using CSE-CIC-IDS2018 & CIC-IDS2017 dataset. Features data preprocessing, feature engineering, and ensemble model evaluation in a Jupyter environment.

title: phishing-email-detector
description: This project is a phishing email detection system built using Python and machine learning. It uses natural language processing (NLP) and a Naive Bayes classifier to identify whether an email is phishing or legitimate. The model is trained on sample data and deployed for real-time prediction.

title: jayesh

title: logiclearner
description: Logic Learner is an online learning tool that helps computer science, engineering, and mathematics students improve their fluency and problem solving process in writing proofs for propositional logic.

title: expense-tracker
description: A simple expense tracker built while learning web development

title: skoolarplay
description: A comprehensive free learning App for Students.

title: Deepfake-Audio-Detection-System
description: A deepfake audio detection system is a machine learning-based security tool designed to analyze audio recordings and distinguish between human-spoken voice and AI-synthesized or manipulated speech.

title: OpenDelight
description: [SIGGRAPH 2026 (Journal Track)] Learning a Delighting Prior for Facial Appearance Capture in the Wild.

title: crypto-ai-alert-bot
description: AI-powered crypto signal alert system that uses hybrid machine learning models to analyze live market data and send Buy/Sell alerts via Telegram and email. Includes automated training and 30-minute alert workflows with GitHub Actions.
